    Serialisierte Form

    • Package de.btu.kt.syx

      • Ausnahmeklasse de.btu.kt.syx.IllegalStateError

        class IllegalStateError extends Error implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

      • Ausnahmeklasse de.btu.kt.syx.NotSupportedException

        class NotSupportedException extends Error implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

    • Package de.btu.kt.syx.apps

      • Ausnahmeklasse de.btu.kt.syx.apps.AAppc.CommandNotAcceptedException

        class CommandNotAcceptedException extends Exception implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

    • Package de.btu.kt.syx.devices

      • Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.devices.AInstrument

        class AInstrument extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

        • Serialisierte Felder

          • devNum
            int devNum
            The device number of the hardware instrument (1, ..., AInstrument.getMaxDevNum()()). Device numbers identify multiple instruments of the same type.
          • verbose
            int verbose
            Verbose level, 0: silence

      • Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.devices.BankTree

        class BankTree extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

        • Serialisierte Felder

          • bankChildren
            LinkedHashMap<String,BankTree<T extends BankTree.IBankObject>.Bank> bankChildren
            The list of bank children.
          • name
            String name
            The name of this node.
          • objectType
            String objectType
            A human-readable type name of bank objects stored in this bank tree, e.g., "Patch" or "Multi"
          • parent
            BankTree<T extends BankTree.IBankObject> parent
            The parent node.
          • treeChilderen
            LinkedHashMap<String,BankTree<T extends BankTree.IBankObject>> treeChilderen
            The list of tree children.
          • UID
            String UID
            The unique identifier of this node in its parent node.

      • Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.devices.BankTree.Bank

        class Bank extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

        • Serialisierte Felder

          • children
            LinkedHashMap<String,BankTree<T extends BankTree.IBankObject>.BankObject> children
            The list of child nodes.
          • name
            String name
            The name of this node.
          • parent
            BankTree<T extends BankTree.IBankObject> parent
            The parent node.
          • UID
            String UID
            The the globally unique identifier of this node in the bank tree.

      • Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.devices.BankTree.BankObject

        class BankObject extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

        • Serialisierte Felder

          • name
            String name
            The name of this node.
          • object
            T extends BankTree.IBankObject object
            The data object stored in this node, can be null
          • parent
            BankTree<T extends BankTree.IBankObject>.Bank parent
            The parent node.
          • UID
            String UID
            The unique identifier of this node in its parent node.

    • Package de.btu.kt.syx.midi

      • Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxChecksum

        class SyxChecksum extends SyxDataStruct implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

        • Serialisierte Felder

          • nFirstPart
            int nFirstPart
            Zero-based index of the first message part to include in checksum computation
          • nParts
            int nParts
            Number of parts to include in checksum computation, -1 to include all parts from nFirstPart to the end of the message
          • nType
            int nType
            The check sum type, one of SyxChecksum.ADD, SyxChecksum.XOR or SyxChecksum.ROLAND

      • Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxDataStruct

        class SyxDataStruct extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

        • Serialisierte Felder

          • data
            byte[] data
            The internal data buffer
          • filterMask
            byte[] filterMask
            Filter mask for matching byte arrays on the data pattern
          • format
            char[] format
            The bit-wise data format specifier
          • name
            String name
            The name of this struct, may be null
          • paramInfos
            HashMap<Character,SyxParamInfo> paramInfos
            Map of struct parameter name → permissible midiValues. If a struct parameter name is not contained in the map, the permissible value range will be detected automatically from the parameter's bit count.
            Siehe auch:
            • SyxDataStruct.paramInfos
            • SyxDataStruct.getParamBitCount(char)

      • Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxMessage

        class SyxMessage extends SysexMessage implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

        • Serialisierte Felder

          • paramMap
            LinkedHashMap<String,SyxParamInfo> paramMap
            List of unique parameter names of this message mapping to their parameter information.
          • parts
            ArrayList<SyxDataStruct> parts
            System exclusive data structs of this message
          • status
            int status
            The status byte of this message.

      • Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxParamInfo

        class SyxParamInfo extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

        • Serialisierte Felder

          • defMidiValue
            int defMidiValue
            The default MIDI value
          • descr
            String descr
            The parameter name (as seen on hardware instrument)
          • maxMidiValue
            int maxMidiValue
            The largest permissible MIDI value
          • minMidiValue
            int minMidiValue
            The smallest permissible MIDI value
          • modelValueOffset
            int modelValueOffset
            The model value offset.

            modelValue = midiValue + modelValueOffset
            midiValue = modelValue - modelValueOffset

          • modelValueRange
            int[] modelValueRange
            An array of two integers; is null if the parameter does not have consecutive integer model values.
            • modelValueRange[0]: the smallest permissible model value,
            • modelValueRange[1]: the largest permissible model value.
          • paramChangeMsgFormat
            String paramChangeMsgFormat
            Format specifier of the system exclusive parameter change message, may be null.
          • parent
            SyxDataStruct parent
            The SyxDataStruct containing the parameter.
          • pname
            char pname
            The parameter name in the SyxDataStruct containing the parameter.
          • UID
            String UID
            The unique parameter name in the SyxMessage.
          • valueMap
            SequencedMap<Integer,Integer> valueMap
            Map of model values to MIDI values. The key set contains all permissible model values and the value set contains the respective permissible MIDI values.

            Remark:

            If this attribute is set, valueNamesMap must be null, and the parameter type is SyxDataStruct.PTYPE.ENUM_INT.

          • valueNamesMap
            SequencedMap<String,Integer> valueNamesMap
            Map of model value names to MIDI values. The key set contains all permissible model value names and the value set contains the respective permissible MIDI values.

            Remark:

            If this attribute is set, valueMap must be null, and the parameter type is SyxDataStruct.PTYPE.ENUM_STR.
